title: Arlong’s Hatred Hardens
description: On pages 16–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Royal Guards. The core beat is arlong’s hatred hardens.
scene: The scene follows arlong’s hatred hardens, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Royal Guards.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Calling Ryluguu Palace! Calling Ryluguu Palace!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is a gigantic, heavily damaged vessel requesting admission to the island!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, what are you waiting for? Let them in immediately!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: There seem to be Tenryubito on board!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Allow them admission!! Dispatch an emergency squadron to the coast!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I will be there at once!!!

summary: Arlong’s Hatred Hardens. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
